arts.ttl: Marmoush to Man City: Guardiola's €80m gamble
arts.sum: Manchester City are closing in on the blockbuster signing of Eintracht Frankfurt striker Omar Marmoush in a deal that, on the face of it, makes little sense. Yet the signing of Marmoush is arguably Pep Guardiola's biggest gamble because, on the face of it, it is a deal that makes little sense.

arts.ttl: Man City in talks to sign 20-year-old Uzbekistan international defender
arts.sum: Lens manager Will Still admitted centre-back Abdukodir Khusanov could be leaving this month

arts.ttl: Salford’s Curtis Tilt goes from driving excavators to facing Erling Haaland
arts.sum: The 33-year-old defender will lead his team out for one of the biggest games of his career on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Man City's Bobb in training after five months out
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Oscar Bobb returns to training after five months out with fractured leg.

arts.ttl: Official Manchester City bid for Omar Marmoush expected this weekend
arts.sum: An official bid from Manchester City for Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush is expected this weekend, according to Florian Plettenburg. The Egyptian international has been high on City’s wish list…

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester City vs. Salford City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's FA Cup clash between Manchester City and Salford City.

arts.ttl: Man City 'fail' with opening bid for 18-year-old defender as Pep Guardiola suffers £33.5m blow
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly see their first offer for Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis rejected by the Brazilian side, but they remain optimistic of striking an agreement.

arts.ttl: Liverpool could hijack ‘world-class’ Man City target; reliable journalist says Reds ‘looking’ at him
arts.sum: Liverpool’s need for a star holding midfielder evaporated in weeks after Ryan Gravenberch took to the field under Arne Slot. Despite the jury being firmly out on the Dutch international ahead of the 2024/25 campaign, the former Bayern Munich flop went on to secure a well-deserved starting berth in the first-XI. arts.ttl: Hidden Pep Guardiola comment exposes Man City squad divide that must be closed
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola let slip something he wasn't happy with last week - and will have been working hard to solve it ahead of the FA Cup clash with Salford.

arts.ttl: Manchester City make formal offer for player after striking contract agreement – He ‘welcomes the deal’
arts.sum: Manchester City have officially made their move for Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis, with discussions on going about the potential transfer. That’s according to GE Globo, who report that Manchester City have made a proposal for the young defender, who ‘welcomes the deal’.
